name: chief-of-staff
description: > C-suite orchestration layer that routes founder questions to the right advisor role(s), triggers multi-role board meetings for complex decisions, synthesizes outputs, tracks decisions, and manages cross-functional alignment. Every C-suite interaction starts here. Use when coordinating executive decisions, routing strategic questions, managing board meetings, synthesizing multi-perspective advice, tracking decision history, resolving inter-department conflicts, or when user mentions chief of st
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一个面向创始人的高管协调中枢，能把战略问题自动分派给合适的顾问角色，复杂决策时召集多方"董事会"会商，汇总意见、记录决议并打通跨部门协作，适合需要多视角决策支持的场景。
